items.title: Man City sweep past Brighton in FA Cup final to complete domestic double
items.summary: Manchester City completed the domestic double after beating Brighton 4-0 in the Women's FA Cup final at Wembley.

items.title: Liverpool confirm Ibrahima Konate will LEAVE club as they release statement with Chelsea ‘targeting free transfer’
items.summary: LIVERPOOL have confirmed that Ibrahima Konate will LEAVE Anfield this summer. The Reds failed to agree fresh terms with the French defender, whose contract will officially expire at the end of June. items.title: Chelsea set to sign McCabe following Arsenal exit
items.summary: Chelsea are set to sign Republic of Ireland captain Katie McCabe following her exit from Arsenal.

items.title: Zidane and Mahrez in Algeria World Cup squad
items.summary: Luca Zidane - son of France legend Zinedine Zidane - is named in Algeria's squad for the upcoming World Cup.

items.title: 'Wow!' | RCB make rapid start by taking out Gill and Sudharsan in back-to-back overs
items.summary: Defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru make a rapid start in their battle for the Indian Premier League title against Gujarat Titans, taking out Shubman Gill and Sai Sudharsan in the second and third overs.

items.title: Uruguay pick Man Utd's Ugarte but Suarez left out
items.summary: Uruguay include Manchester United midfielder Manuel Ugarte in their squad for the World Cup - but there is no place for veteran striker Luis Suarez.

items.title: Sabalenka vs Osaka to play first French Open women's night match for three years
items.summary: The French Open will stage a women's match in its night session for the first time in three years when a pair of four-time Grand Slam champions, Aryna Sabalenka and Naomi Osaka, meet on Monday.

items.title: England players advised to holiday in US pre-World Cup
items.summary: England head coach Thomas Tuchel wants his players to get used to the weather and US time zones well before they kick off their World Cup campaign on 17 June.
